---
title: "Lab 8 — LLM Sentiment vs. Human Sentiment"
---

# Lab 8 — LLM Sentiment vs. Human Sentiment

**Read first:** Chapter 21 (Sentiment Analysis with LLMs).

{{< include ../../assignments/assignment_08.qmd >}}

## AI and me

1. How did AI **support** you in this lab?
2. How did AI **fail** you?
3. How did AI **extend** you?
